headline: Annual Global Renewable Energy Investment Could Reach $2.9 Trillion in the Next 5 Years. Here's 1 Top Renewable Energy Stock to Buy.

headline: Fund Manager: Wall Street Is Using the Wrong ‘E’ to Judge AI Valuations
summary: On a recent episode of the Animal Spirits podcast titled Talk Your Book: AI Is Not a Bubble, Alger portfolio manager Dr. Ankur Crawford made a deceptively simple argument that cuts against most of the current debate over AI valuations: investors are arguing about the price-to-earnings ratio without first agreeing on what the earnings actually ... headline: Constellation Energy (CEG) Seen as High-Quality Power Demand Play, but Goldman Flags Valuation

headline: Inside the world's largest gas turbine plant
summary: Hyperscalers including Meta and Microsoft are increasingly relying on GE Vernova to power their data centers. CNBC's Seema Mody joins 'Squawk on the Street' with more.

headline: The Trillion-Dollar AI Shockwave Nobody Is Ready For
summary: One small company quietly built irreplaceable power infrastructure in Norway years before the AI boom hit. In May 2026, it signed a binding letter for a 15-year, $2.6 billion lease to host AI workloads at the site. The market still hasn't caught on.
